headline: The Hat Selects Square to Power Multi-State Expansion
summary: DISTRIBUTED-WORKFORCE/OAKLAND, Calif., May 19, 2026--Square today announced that The Hat, a quick-service restaurant (QSR) beloved for its pastrami sandwiches for 75 years, has selected Square as its unified commerce platform. With Square’s technology foundation now rolled out across The Hat’s 11 locations in California, the brand is ready to embark on its first expansion out of state. This month, The Hat is opening its 12th restaurant in Las Vegas, Nevada, marking a new chapter of multi-locatio

headline: Prism Layer Appoints Liam Kenneally as Founding Chief Revenue Officer
summary: WASHINGTON, May 19, 2026--Prism Layer, the first AI-native platform for enterprise risk management, today announced the formal appointment of Liam Kenneally as Founding Chief Revenue Officer. Kenneally has been instrumental in Prism Layer’s commercial foundation, leading go-to-market strategy, business development, partnerships, revenue operations, and market expansion across regulated industries.

headline: Meta Doubles Down, Reassigns 7,000 Employees To AI Teams While Slashing 8,000 Jobs In Mark Zuckerberg's High-Stakes Push: Report
summary: Meta is shifting 7,000 employees into AI roles while cutting 8,000 jobs as Mark Zuckerberg intensifies the company's AI push.
